base_tokens: However , The Common Good , the large welfare report published by the Ford Foundation in 1989 , provided reasoned support ( backed by a surprisingly broad consensus of celebrity names ) for a rather strict and expensive work and relief program that did secure jobs , but also determined that every person would be thrown off the welfare recipients ' lists two years later .
